# ScreenTranslate

> Select any area on your Mac screen and get instant translation. Fully on-device with Apple Translation. Private, fast, offline.

## Overview

ScreenTranslate is a free macOS menu bar app that translates text from any screen area. Press a keyboard shortcut, drag to select, and read the translation — all in under a second.

- **Platform**: macOS 15 Sequoia+ (Apple Silicon + Intel)
- **Price**: Free
- **Privacy**: All processing happens on-device. No servers, no tracking, no data collection.
- **Website**: https://screentranslate.filient.ai/
- **Download**: https://screentranslate.filient.ai/ (DMG)
- **Source**: https://github.com/hcmhcs/screenTranslate

## Key Features

- On-device OCR via Apple Vision framework
- On-device translation via Apple Translation framework
- 18 languages supported with auto-detect
- Works offline after downloading language packs
- Translation history with search
- Customizable keyboard shortcuts
- Lightweight menu bar app
- Auto-updates via Sparkle

## How It Works

1. Press customizable keyboard shortcut
2. Drag to select screen area containing text
3. Translation appears in a popup near your selection

## Detailed Info

- [Full documentation](https://screentranslate.filient.ai/llms-full.txt)
